content.content:
Web search results for query: "mod browser UI design CSS grid Nexus Mods CurseForge card layout implementation open source"

Links: [{"title":"Modern UI - Minecraft Mods - CurseForge","url":"https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-ui"},{"title":"HyUI - Hytale Mods - CurseForge","url":"https://www.curseforge.com/hytale/mods/hyui"},{"title":"Ureal game integration - Mod browser | Getting Started – CurseForge for Studios API","url":"https://docs.curseforge.com/docs/game-integration/unreal/mod-browser/"},{"title":"An Update on the Mod Browsing Overhaul at Nexus mods and community","url":"https://www.nexusmods.com/news/15239"},{"title":"GitHub - thomasloven/lovelace-card-mod: 🔹 Add CSS styles to (almost) any lovelace card","url":"https://github.com/thomasloven/lovelace-card-mod"},{"title":"Tiles or grid feature to view mods and library (Curseforge feature) · Issue #2850 · modrinth/code","url":"https://github.com/modrinth/code/issues/2850"},{"title":"Browser Mod Popup With Grid Card - Frontend - Home Assistant Community","url":"https://community.home-assistant.io/t/browser-mod-popup-with-grid-card/485854"},{"title":"Modding the new design of nexusmods.com - General Chat - Nexus Mods Forums","url":"https://forums.nexusmods.com/topic/13511343-modding-the-new-design-of-nexusmodscom/"}]

I've completed the web search for your query. Here are the results:

The search returned information about mod browser design implementations across different platforms:

**Nexus Mods:** Nexus Mods introduced a new design system standardizing color palette, typography hierarchy, iconography, spacings and grids, with grid and list views being explored as display options to provide more content visibility.

**CurseForge:** The CurseForge mod browser UI is fully white-labeled, allowing modification of colors, fonts, and layouts to match game branding.

**UI Library Examples:** The search also found several open-source UI frameworks relevant to mod browser design:
- HyUI allows building complex, interactive UIs using either a fluent Java Builder API or HYUIML, a declarative HTML/CSS-like syntax
- Card-mod enables adding CSS styles to cards through grid configurations

**Community Feedback:** Users have requested configuration switches between tiles and list UI formats like CurseForge provides for better mod browsing experiences.

The search results show active discussion around card layout implementations and CSS grid usage in mod browser interfaces, though specific open-source implementations of complete mod browser systems were limited in these results.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
